_comment: Test-specific parameters. Accelerator parameters are in params.json.

test2._comment: mode_transfer.py — spatial transfer function. Amplitude comes from params.json quad_random_dy/dx_max.

test4._comment: drift_monitor_sim.py — calibrated-reference drift tracking. DQ0_RMS comes from params.json quad_random_dy/dx_max.

test5._comment: bpm_offset_drift_sim.py — two-estimator robustness vs BPM drift. DQ0_RMS comes from params.json quad_random_dy/dx_max.
